frozen_decision.stopping_rule: stop when (a) 60 eligible randomized events reached OR (b) all buildable pool tasks attempted (max_attempts=pool_size after image builds). Never stop on observed p-value/trend.
frozen_decision.verdict: STRUCTURALLY UNDERPOWERED for the practically-relevant interaction (MDE b3=-2000) at any feasible N: power<=0.15 even at N=200. Only a VERY strong moderator (b3<=-6000) is detectable at N~60-120. The single-shot x newest-only pool ceiling (<=18 interventions) is far below the 60-event floor. => Expected outcome tier #4 (underpowered) UNLESS the true effect is very large; the formal run will still (1) validate protocol integrity, (2) estimate ATE/interaction as effect-size + CI (not significance), (3) test cache-preservation mechanism, (4) provide a defensible upper bound on N achievable.
